steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage states the No Name Series published books anonymously and challenged readers to guess authors' identities, reflecting fascination for literary mystery. The core of the publishing approach is keeping authors' identities secret.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Clandestine means “kept secret” — it perfectly fits the context of an approach centered on anonymity and concealed identity. The other three don't: preliminary is preparatory, unequivocal means clear, and inexplicable refers to something baffling rather than intentionally hidden. That matches choice B — B is correct.
